seo.title: Beth Motley, MD — Lifestyle Medicine Physician | Greenville, SC
seo.description: Dr. Motley is a board-certified family and lifestyle medicine physician in Greenville, SC. She helps patients reverse chronic disease through evidence-based lifestyle interventions.

hero.headline: Reverse Disease. Restore Health. Reclaim Your Life.
hero.subheadline: Board-certified lifestyle medicine physician helping patients prevent, treat, and reverse chronic disease through evidence-based lifestyle interventions — not just more prescriptions.

doctorIntro.name: Beth Motley, MD, FACLM
doctorIntro.bio: Board-certified in both family medicine and lifestyle medicine. Fellow of the American College of Lifestyle Medicine. Helping patients in Greenville, SC reverse chronic disease through the way they live.

lifestyleMedicine.title: What Is Lifestyle Medicine?
lifestyleMedicine.subtitle: Lifestyle medicine uses evidence-based behavioral interventions to treat, reverse, and prevent chronic disease. It addresses the root causes of illness through six foundational pillars.

pillars.title: Nutrition
pillars.description: Whole-food, plant-predominant eating patterns that prevent and reverse disease.

pillars.title: Physical Activity
pillars.description: Movement strategies tailored to your body, goals, and medical history.

pillars.title: Sleep
pillars.description: Restorative sleep habits that support metabolic health and recovery.

pillars.title: Stress Management
pillars.description: Evidence-based techniques to lower cortisol and build emotional resilience.

pillars.title: Social Connection
pillars.description: Meaningful relationships that improve outcomes and sustain lasting change.

pillars.title: Avoiding Risky Substances
pillars.description: Reducing tobacco, excess alcohol, and other substances that drive chronic disease.

programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: Structured, physician-led programs designed to produce measurable results. Both programs accept insurance.

items.title: Diabetes Reversal — Shared Medical Appointments
items.description: A physician-led shared medical appointment program designed to help individuals improve blood sugars, reduce medications, and work toward diabetes remission through evidence-based Lifestyle Medicine.

items.title: Executive MD Program
items.description: A concierge-level health optimization program for professionals who want proactive, personalized care. Includes comprehensive evaluation, advanced diagnostics, and an individualized lifestyle protocol.

aboutPreview.headline: An Engineer's Mind. A Physician's Heart.
paragraphs: Dr. Motley brings a unique combination of engineering precision and clinical compassion to medicine. After earning her biomedical engineering degree from the University of Virginia, she pursued her MD and discovered that the most powerful treatments are often the simplest: what we eat, how we move, and the way we live.

Today, she practices family and lifestyle medicine at Prisma Health in Greenville, SC, where she helps patients reverse type 2 diabetes, lower blood pressure, and reduce their dependence on medications — using evidence-based lifestyle interventions that address the root causes of chronic disease.

testimonials.title: Patient Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from patients who committed to the process.

items.quote: Dr. Motley is truly a phenomenal doctor. Willing to listen and help. So thankful for her.
items.name: Dr. Motley

items.quote: I drove over an hour to see Dr Motley because health care in my area is lacking in a variety of ways. The visit was better than I could have hoped for and I will definitely be back. Thank you all for doing health care RIGHT!
items.name: Dr. Motley

items.quote: Dr. Motley has been my primary physician for the last seven years, and my wife's for the past four. If you need a physician who not only cares about your lifestyle — but also lives it out — then Dr. Motley is your doctor. Highly recommended.
items.name: Patient

items.quote: Dr. Motley has been life changing for me since I have become an established patient. She listens and is literally there for you and your well-being. Grateful and if I could give 20 stars, I would.
items.name: Patient

community.title: Join Pear Down
community.description: Get direct access to Dr. Motley, join a community of people healing together, and get exclusive content on lifestyle medicine, plant-based nutrition, and chronic disease reversal.
community.subdescription: Lifestyle medicine education, coaching, and a supportive community — all in one place.

newsletter.title: Stay Connected
newsletter.description: Get evidence-based health insights, program updates, and practical lifestyle medicine tips delivered to your inbox. No spam, no gimmicks — just science you can use.
